## Scope guardrails (required)
- [ ] Change is limited to the smallest possible scope.
- [ ] No unrelated refactor/renaming/reformatting was included.
- [ ] If content changed, only the intended pages/content files were edited.
- [ ] If CI/workflow/config changed, I explain why in detail above.

## Validation (required)
- [ ] `npm run ci`
- [ ] Manual spot-check on changed pages (desktop + mobile)
- [ ] No broken internal links introduced

## Risk & rollback
- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Rollback plan (1 sentence):
